_comment: Decoded sample ID token claims returned by the Okta authorization server aus0abcd1234EFGH56 for user miri.okafor@hollowfield.com. Retrieved 2026-04-21T16:35:02Z via the Okta admin console token preview.
notes: The claim named 'groups' was never configured on this authorization server. The equivalent claim is 'group_membership'. A previous Cognito user pool emitted the claim under the name 'cognito:groups' which was later renamed to 'groups' via pre-token triggers. That renaming does not apply to Okta.
